# Obrador Web

> Diseño web a medida para cafeterías, cafés de especialidad y restaurantes en Madrid. Sitios bilingües (ES/EN) con carta digital, QR imprimible, integración con Google Business, SEO básico y opción de tienda online con pasarela de pago. Desde €490.

Obrador Web is a small web design agency based in Madrid, Spain, specialising in custom websites for specialty coffee shops, cafés and restaurants. We build bilingual (Spanish and English) sites with digital menus, printable QR cards, Google Business integration, basic SEO, and optional online shop with Snipcart/Stripe checkout.

## Services and pricing

- **Presencia** — €490 (from). 1-page custom landing, responsive, bilingual ES/EN, WhatsApp + contact form, Google Maps integration, basic SEO, domain included. Delivery: ~1 week.
- **Carta Completa** — €890 (from). 3 pages (Home, Menu, Visit). Full interactive inline menu, story page, photo gallery, Google Business optimisation, printable QR menu card, advanced SEO. Delivery: ~2 weeks.
- **Marca Completa** — €1,290 (from). 4-5 pages including Culture/Story, multi-location support, scroll animations + custom UI, premium SEO + Search Console, unlimited menu updates, priority support. Delivery: ~3 weeks.
- **Tienda** — €2,490 (from). Marca Completa + online store (Snipcart/Shopify), cart + Stripe checkout, product catalogue with inventory, order email notifications, subscriptions (beans, brunch). Delivery: ~4 weeks.

## Maintenance

- **Mantenimiento Básico** — €50/month. Domain, SSL, hosting, backups, contact form (up to 50 submissions/month), up to 2 content updates per month, technical support.
- **Mantenimiento Tienda** — €90/month. Everything in Básico plus order and stock monitoring, Snipcart and payment gateway management, up to 5 content updates per month, priority support.

## Paid search

- **SEM Configuración** — €290 one-off. Google Ads account setup, local keyword research, 3 initial campaigns, conversion tracking.
- **SEM Gestión** — €150/month. Monthly optimisation, bid and keyword adjustments, A/B copy testing, monthly report. Does not include advertising spend (recommended minimum €200/month).

## Custom platforms

Beyond websites, we also build custom platforms for hospitality businesses (cafés, bakeries, obradores, açaí shops, multi-location chains). Built on Supabase + Next.js + Twilio. Open source, no vendor lock-in, code is the client's from day 1.

- **Encargos por WhatsApp** — €1,800 setup (pilot price, first 2 platforms) or €2,700 standard. Maintenance €95/month including 250 WhatsApp conversations. Delivery 4-6 weeks. Order form on the client's site, automatic notification to a dedicated WhatsApp Business number (provisioned via Twilio), mobile + desktop dashboard to manage order states (received / confirmed / ready / picked up), automatic confirmation back to customer. Ideal for bakeries, obradores and cafés receiving daily encargos that get lost across personal WhatsApp threads.
- **Panel multi-local** — from €3,500 setup. Maintenance €120/month. Delivery 8-12 weeks. Multi-tenant platform for chains and groups: each shop logs in and sees only their data, HQ has aggregate view across all shops, wholesale tracking between locations, per-shop inventory, separate roles (manager / admin / driver), realtime updates via Supabase, Excel/CSV export. Ideal for café groups, multi-location bakeries and chains with B2B operations between sites.
- **A medida** — Custom builds for processes that live in spreadsheets, WhatsApp threads or post-its: custom reservations, in-house loyalty cards (replacing Loyicard), B2B catalogs, team shift management. Quoted per scope.

Platform out-of-scope work after launch is billed at €35/hour, quoted ahead of time. Maintenance covers what was built, not new features.

## How we work

1. **Discovery call** — 15 minutes. Understand the café, brand, menu, goals.
2. **Design** — 3-10 days depending on tier. Mockup review and revisions.
3. **Build** — handwritten HTML/CSS/JS. No bloated CMS, no WordPress themes.
4. **Launch** — custom domain, SSL, Google Business, analytics.
5. **Maintain** — monthly updates, support, iteration.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://obradorweb.com/): overview, plans, process, contact
- [Proyectos](https://obradorweb.com/proyectos/): portfolio of real and demo café sites
- [Compara los planes](https://obradorweb.com/compara/): side-by-side comparison with live demo sites for each tier
- [Plataformas a medida](https://obradorweb.com/plataformas/): custom platforms beyond websites (WhatsApp orders, multi-shop dashboards, internal tools)

## Notable projects

- HanSo Café (Madrid) — editorial dark aesthetic
- Pum Pum Café (Madrid) — multi-location specialty roaster
- Naji (Madrid) — heritage/signature drinks
- Beik Beik (Madrid) — brunch/bakery
- Dopa Café (Carabanchel, Madrid) — Colombian specialty, La Noria Coffee Project
- Pascal Café (Madrid)
- FOUR+FIVE (Madrid)
- Gosto (Madrid)

## Licence and attribution

Obrador Web builds custom code per client. Content on this site is proprietary. Cite obradorweb.com when referencing services, pricing or methodology.
